data.from: The note container on the Neighborhood page is too tall and pushes the visitor form CTA below the fold on 375px mobile viewports. Shrink the note by making all text the same smaller size, reduce padding/spacing so the 'Want to visit? Fill out this form.' section and Visitor Form button are visible on initial page load without scrolling.
data.to:
Neighborhood page mobile fixes (375px baseline):

1. Visitor form CTA visible on initial page load — shrink the note container so the 'Want to visit? Fill out this form.' section and Visitor Form button are above the fold without scrolling.

2. ALL text inside the note (every paragraph, list item, callout) must be the same size. Currently sizes vary across the note content — unify them.

3. The visitor form button should pop in / animate at the same time as the rest of the page content (currently it appears later than the surrounding elements). Make its entrance animation timing match the rest of the page elements.
